What is it?
Well, I thought you were having fun.
If that's the case, please don't talk to me. I don't want to waste my precious time.
What is it this time?
This time it's the actress making an appearance, you're really into your promotional activities, huh!
I told you, you don't need to do any promotions. Why do you think there's a need to do that now?
Because I can't meet Ted, and I'm bored.
Please stop making a fool of yourself for such a silly reason.
I'll think about it.
Do you need something?

I just can't bring myself to like that person.
People like him probably like glamorous women, right?
It's like that with all men, maybe.
Even the boss says things like that? You shouldn't turn into Tony.
Tony-san, you always seem to be alone when I notice.
Yeah, that’s right.
Maybe you should talk to him.
Are you kidding? He outright told me he has no use for kids. He hates me.
Did that person really win the Tony Award for Best Musical Director?
I wonder.
I won't say anything bad. It's better to stay away from Tony Ford.
Why do you say that so definitively?
I feel this is intuition.
Something about that person feels like they're involved in some incident. Types like the boss, who are easy to trick, are a warning!
Yeah, yeah, your intuition is amazing.
Come on, this time I'm gonna be right!
Right? For some reason, Tony Ford is there. I was shocked.
There's no surprise in that.
Really? He's a famous actor in the theater world. Getting to see him up close is nothing short of surprising.
Famous actor?
Is that really a compliment?
Boss, you don’t know anything. That guy has a lot of dangerous rumors surrounding him.
No way, saying that in front of him!
It's fine, he can't hear us.
Who’s
his agent though?
But those two really stick together, huh.
Well, that's important.
to protect against external enemies
I suppose.
Who are the external enemies, and who is it that
Well, putting that aside,
Cindy and I are together, so it's only natural that I want to be by her side.
Together, huh?
I wonder why you think like that.
Please don't make that exasperated face. I'm just stating facts!
She only loves women, you know!
You shouldn't throw around such statements carelessly.
But it's just a common rumor!
It's frustrating because you won't believe anything I say.
Did she flirt with you or something?
No, why would you say that?
Oh! You really believed what I said earlier, huh?
No, it's actually the opposite.
Yeah, yeah, you can't possibly believe what I said.
But you're actually quite a nice person.
I don't know about that? I feel like I've been getting the evil eye from you for a while.
It's because Boss is a guy.
I can't help but worry about when they'll make a move.
But maybe she's actually a real womanly woman.
That's cute, though. It just feels like I want to hug her!
Was that the kind of type she was?
Huh? Cute kids are loved beyond gender, you know.
Haa.
But, you know, it would be nice to have a girl like that by my side. Hehe.
Actually, I
have a photo book.
Is that so? Then you should’ve brought it today to get a signature.
Ah! Th-That completely slipped my mind.
Let's get closer then.
Nsu!! That's right.
No, really,
isn’t human.
What’s that?
I mean, she’s really cute, it’s hard to believe she's a woman.
Even when you do business, you don’t make a face of dislike.
If anything happens, I’ll definitely come to ask you.
You say such cute things.
Phew.
Hmm, so she’s coming to make a request.
But, if by any chance that happens,
it seems like she will come.
Yeah,
They might come, I guess.
But,
if that's the case, there's no way they'd come to my place, right?
Ah
Ah, I wished I was born like
her.
Modern sex symbols seem to have a pure appearance, right?
Modern sex symbols!?
That's right! She’s all about that.”
I don’t really get that vibe, though.
Even if you say you don’t feel that way, that’s not okay.
Could it be that you didn’t know about her existence until today?
That's not true, I've seen the movie.
Oh? So maybe you're secretly a fan?
Not really, that's not it.
You don't have to be shy about it. Hehe.
She has a calm image, doesn't she?
Is Meryl a fussy person?
Why would that be?
You know, he gets pretty annoyed when you talk to him.
I hope I didn't do something to upset you?
Well,
I just said if you have any worries, feel free to consult our office.
But if you offend him, it can get really tough. It's fine if you don’t talk to him anymore.
Right.
Ah, but can I get his autograph first?
Do whatever you want.
Hehe.
Oh! Maybe there are just too many distractions to get close to the director,
and that's why he's annoyed. Hehe.
That's just ridiculous.
Well, it can surprisingly be like that, you know. Even actresses are just human.
Right?
I heard Jennifer didn't get along with him, so that might be why he's irritated.
Director Fabar is surprisingly smart.
Huh? What's that supposed to mean?
Because when you see directors in magazines or on TV, don't they look much chunkier?
Not really.
It's just shocking, isn't it?
But still,
being a film director seems to be a lucrative job.
Yeah, this mansion is amazing.
With such a spacious mansion, living alone must be lonely.
Yeah, that's true.
But for living alone, this current place is good enough for me.
Hey, don't compare yourself to him.
Oh, why not?
If I marry Director Fabar, this mansion could be mine, you know.
Director Fabar gets all squinty and grins when Meryl and Jennifer come.
I wonder why he always notices those things.
Being a detective, shouldn't he notice such things? He needs to pay attention.
I'm curious about the love triangle between Director Fabar, Meryl, and Jennifer.
Your eyes sparkle when you talk about stuff like that.
It's just that I'm really interested in it, you know. Hehe.
If the Boss became a movie director, he might have been able to do a lot of good things with actresses.
Is something going on with Guy?
That's not really it, but...
I mean, since we met up today, you haven't talked to Kristy, right?
Gai?
Yep, I’ve been checking quite a bit, you know.
Why were you looking at Gai so much?
It's not just Gai I'm watching; I keep an eye on everyone.
What kind of person is Gai?
He's just like he looks, a typical sports type.
His vocabulary is quite poor.
He seems like a refreshing young man, but doesn’t he feel like he’s acting a bit?
The Gai I know still has the strong image of his student days. Or rather, I might only know Gai from his student days.
Well, I guess that's just how it is.
Gai is popular, so...
San might have a hard time.
I didn't expect Gai to be such a ladies' man.
Don't express your disbelief like that. We're still best friends.
It's just that he's become quite different from the image I had before. I'm feeling a bit shocked.
From earlier,
Meryl and Jennifer are the famous women he keeps approaching.
You don't have to make that angry face.
Why doesn't he talk to me?
I'm glad I'm not Gai's fiancée.
San looked a bit bored not being able to talk to Gai.
Really? I think I'm acting normally.
Haaa, Boss, you're really
so dense. With you being a detective, it feels like a huge lie.
H-horrible.
Boss, please try to act more like a detective!
How about going to  and comforting them?
Why should I?
Well, you're friends, right?
But Boss,
you're cold towards .
You should talk more with .
I’ll talk whenever I want to, no need for orders.
You can't think so naïvely. Now that Guy has become like that, the one suffering the most is
, you know.
Speaking of which,
I've heard you’ve been asking various things?
Yes, since that's the only common topic we have. I can't think of anything else to talk about.
Ah, so that's why you were digging into my past.
When trying to prolong the conversation, it naturally led to that kind of questioning. So what?
No, I just wondered what suddenly got into you.
That's all.
Boss, just so you know, I have no interest in dating someone like you. Sorry to ruin your expectations.
Have you and Guy always been like this?
Do you know about the serial murder case?
Of course! There's no way I wouldn't know.
You don't have to make such a scary face.
If I didn't know about such a gruesome incident, I wouldn't be myself!
I wonder why you say that.
Anyway, as a detective, you can't afford not to know about that case.
Right.
Listen, you must never forgive a murderer who kills weak girls.
I'm not the one who will arrest them, you know?
What kind of image do you have of the suspect?
Even when asked about the sketch of a criminal I don't know much about.
Geez, it's just pathetic, isn't it? Is that really what a detective is?
I assert that the perpetrator is either a pervert or a lunatic.
